name: golang-github-googlecloudplatform-guest-logging-go-dev
title: golang-github-googlecloudplatform-guest-logging-go-dev
summary: Go logging package with Google Cloud Platform interface (library)
description:
Go logging package with Google Cloud Platform interface (library)
The Go logger package logs messages either locally to syslog or via the Google
Cloud logging API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-googlecloudplatform-guest-logging-go-dev because Go logging package with Google Cloud Platform interface (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-googlecloudplatform-guest-logging-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-googlecloudplatform-guest-logging-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-googlecloudplatform-guest-logging-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
